flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 34% at Auburn University at Montgomery vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.7k vs 4.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Auburn University at Montgomery fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7k → 2.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Auburn University at Montgomery fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Auburn University at Montgomery rose 69% between 2021 and 2024 (12.7% → 21.5%).
